entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00071) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 9/27/2016 TO 9/30/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE NEW POSITIONS OR TITLE CHANGES DOCUMENT FOR EXISTING AND NEW POSITIONS TO INCLUDE DESCRIPTIONS AND SECURITY CLEARANCE LEVELS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00072) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION A OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00068, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 4716.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION A OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00072, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 4753.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00074) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DO THE FOLLOWING:
1.INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-7 (REVISION 1), CONTRACTOR SECURITY RESPONSIBILITIES (AUG 2018)
2.INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-8 (REVISION 1), SUPPLEMENTAL INSTRUCTIONS TO EDAR 3452.239-72, DEPARTMENT SECURITY REQUIREMENTS (AUG 2018)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00078) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE ORDERING PERIOD OF THIS CONTRACT FOR SIX MONTHS, IAW FAR 52.217-8 FROM SEPTEMBER 30, 2019 THROUGH MARCH 31,2020.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
